name: Virbac SA
summary: Virbac SA manufactures and sells pharmaceutical, biological, nutritional, and diagnostic products for companion and food-producing animals in France, Europe, Latin America, North America, the Asia Pacific, and the Middle East and Africa. The company offers a range of vaccines, dental hygiene, reproduction, dermatology, parasiticides, diagnostic, antibiotics, and aquaculture products; and veterinary medicines for anesthesia, geriatrics, behavior, and injectable micronutrients, as well as petfood and electronic identification. Virbac SA was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Carros, France.
